zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth De Châtillon於1198年之後出生在法國德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內時，她的父親Gaucher III de CHATILLON8833歲，母親Elisabeth de SAINT-POL8819歲。她和Aubert De Hangest II至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1223年在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆韓格斯吉-桑特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth De Châtillon于1198年之后出生在法国德 艾斯特芒內a利-素-馬內时，她的父亲Gaucher III de CHATILLON8833岁，母亲Elisabeth de SAINT-POL8819岁。她和Aubert De Hangest II至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1223年在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆韓格斯吉-桑特。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth De Châtillon was born after 1198, in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France, her father, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, was 8833 and her mother, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, was 8819. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Aubert De Hangest II. She died in 1223, in Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth De Châtillon est née après 1198, à Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, avait 8833 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, avait 8819 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Aubert De Hangest II. Elle est décédée en 1223, à Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth De Châtillon nach 1198 in Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gaucher III de CHATILLON 8833 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de SAINT-POL 8819. Sie hatte mit Aubert De Hangest II mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1223 in Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth De Châtillon è nata il dopo il 1198 nel Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, aveva 8833 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, aveva 8819 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Aubert De Hangest II. Morì nel 1223, nel Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth De Châtillonが1198年以後にフランスグランド エストマルンチaティロン-スル-マルンで生まれた時，父Gaucher III de CHATILLONは8833歳，母Elisabeth de SAINT-POLは8819歳であった。彼女はAubert De Hangest IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1223年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメハンジェスト-エン-サンテアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth De Châtillon(이)가 1198년 이후 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 cha틸론-수-마니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gaucher III de CHATILLON(은)는 8833세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de SAINT-POL(은)는 8819세였다. 그녀는 Aubert De Hangest II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1223년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 핸그스트--산티르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth De Châtillon nasceu após 1198, em Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, tinha 8833 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, tinha 8819 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Aubert De Hangest II. Ela faleceu em 1223, em Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth De Châtillon родилась после 1198 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-марн, марн, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Gaucher III de CHATILLON было 8833 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, 8819. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Aubert De Hangest II. Она умерла в 1223 г. в местности хангест-ен-сантирр, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth De Châtillon nació después de 1198, en Châtillon-sur-Marne, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Gaucher III de CHATILLON, tenía 8833 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de SAINT-POL, tenía 8819 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Aubert De Hangest II. Murió en 1223, en Hangest-en-Santerre, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
